atomic.c(3) Library Functions Manual atomic.c(3)

NAME

atomic.c - Atomic debug stubs for WASM.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct named_registry_t
Global registry with uthash and rwlock.

Functions


bool debug_atomic_is_initialized (void)
Check if debug atomic tracking is initialized. bool debug_sync_is_initialized (void)
void debug_sync_mutex_lock (const char *file, int line)
void debug_sync_mutex_unlock (const char *file, int line)
bool debug_sync_mutex_trylock (const char *file, int line)
void debug_sync_print_state (void)
Print all synchronization primitive states at once. void named_register (const char *name, void *ptr)
void named_register_fd (int fd, const char *name)

Variables


named_registry_t g_debug_entries = { 0 }

Detailed Description

Atomic debug stubs for WASM.

Definition in file platform/wasm/stubs/atomic.c.

Function Documentation

bool debug_atomic_is_initialized (void )

Check if debug atomic tracking is initialized. In release builds (NDEBUG), returns true. In debug builds, returns actual initialization state.

Definition at line 9 of file platform/wasm/stubs/atomic.c.

9                                        {
10   return true;
11 }




Referenced by atomic_on_cas(), atomic_on_fetch(),
    atomic_on_load(), atomic_on_store(),
    atomic_ptr_on_cas(), atomic_ptr_on_exchange(),
    atomic_ptr_on_load(), and atomic_ptr_on_store().
